title: Broken Zendesk Integration
excerpt: Zendesk integration is in place to automatically create a new item on a board when a ticket is opened. This integration stopped working a few weeks ago and we are unable to identify why the sudden break in system communi…

posts.author: browjosh (Joshua Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: Zendesk integration is in place to automatically create a new item on a board when a ticket is opened. This integration stopped working a few weeks ago and we are unable to identify why the sudden break in system communication

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @browjosh,
Have you tried reaching out to the app developer for support? In the App Marketplace, there’s usually a link to contact them directly. It might also be worth trying to reset or reinstall the app if that’s easy to do—just in case it’s a temporary glitch.
